admission.title: Admission Record
admission.description: Information provided by parents for student enrollment.

classSelection.description: The class the student is applying for.

status.description: Current processing status of the application.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

calendarEvent.title: Calendar Event
calendarEvent.description: A specific date/event on the school academic calendar.

title.description: The event name (e.g., Summer Break, Annual Exams).

date.description: The specific date or start date of the event.

endDate.description: Optional end date for multi-day events.

description.description: Detailed notes or information about the event.

/admissions/{admissionId}.description: Collection of all student admission requests.

/academicCalendar/{eventId}.description: Records representing holidays, exams, and school events.
